---
name: Gate System Enhancement
about: Propose a change or improvement to the gate/access control system
title: "[GATE] "
labels: gate-system
assignees: ''
---

## Current Gate Behavior
Describe how the gate system currently works in the affected area. Include any relevant logic, rules, or conditions.

## Proposed Change
Describe the change you want to make to the gate system. Be specific about new conditions, thresholds, rules, or triggers.

## Testing Criteria
Define what "done" looks like. Include acceptance criteria and specific test cases:
- [ ] Test case 1: ...
- [ ] Test case 2: ...
- [ ] Edge case: ...

## Rollout Strategy
- **Deployment approach:** (e.g., feature flag, staged rollout, immediate release)
- **Affected environments:** (e.g., staging first, then production)
- **Rollback plan:** Describe how to revert if issues arise.
- **Monitoring:** What metrics or logs will confirm success?

## Additional Context
Add any mockups, diagrams, or references here.
